text: Breathe in for 4 and out for 4 with a soft jaw.
Notice one point of steady contact with the mat.
Yoga does not just change the way we see things, it transforms the person who sees.
Tadasana is commonly translated as Mountain Pose.
Keep your exhale slightly longer than your inhale for a calmer pace.
The success of yoga does not lie in the ability to perform postures but in how it changes us.
